name: shipworthy
description: Shipworthy — autonomous, evidence-graded product-readiness auditing for apps and AI agents. A Claude Code / Codex skill suite: an orchestrator plus deep review, product-workflow, and UX-clarity lanes.

plugins.name: shipworthy
plugins.description: Walks every user path, checks UI and backend, and proves whether you're ready to ship — with one evidence ledger, independent verifier gates, and no overclaiming. Read-only, self-contained markdown.
